definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like coffee and tea.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to connect two words, phrases, or clauses of equal importance.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to connect two words, phrases, or clauses of equal importance.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: First, open the box. Then, read the manual.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: First, open the box. Then, read the manual.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mark the beginning of a sequence or list.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to mark the beginning of a sequence or list.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I also like tea.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; too. (Typically placed before the main verb or after 'to be').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; too. (Typically placed before the main verb or after 'to be').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Next, add the sugar.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate the step following the current one.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate the step following the current one.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like coffee, too.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: In addition; also. (Typically at the end of a clause).
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition; also. (Typically at the end of a clause).]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It is too hot.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: An intensifier meaning 'excessively' or 'more than is wanted'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: An intensifier meaning 'excessively' or 'more than is wanted'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: We ate dinner, and after that, we watched a movie.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: We ate dinner, and after that, we watched a movie.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce the next event in a sequence.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce the next event in a sequence.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Would you like tea or coffee?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Would you like tea or coffee?
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to link alternatives.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Finally, close the box.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce the last item in a list or sequence.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce the last item in a list or sequence.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I like fruits, for example, apples.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I like fruits, for example, apples.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a specific item that illustrates a general point.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a specific item that illustrates a general point.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: First I work, then I rest.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: First I work, then I rest.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to indicate what happens next in a sequence.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to indicate what happens next in a sequence.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: If you are hungry, then you should eat.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: If you are hungry, then you should eat.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to state a consequence or result.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to state a consequence or result.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Call me when you arrive.]
